news.headline: CarGurus reports on 2024 auto market focused on affordability, new car inventory rose by 31%, used car market tight.
news.summary: CarGurus released its 2024 Recap & 2025 Outlook, highlighting the impact of affordability on the auto market. Affordability drove increased demand for used vehicles, especially Certified Pre-Owned Vehicles, with prices declining by 3% to an average of $27,900. New vehicle inventory surged by nearly 31%, with prices averaging $49,000 and market days supply exceeding 100 for some automakers like Stellantis, Ford, and Nissan. Certified pre-owned selection increased by nearly 10%, with demand up by 17%. The article mentions the potential impact of proposed tariffs and the possible end of electric vehicle tax credits on vehicle pricing. The rise of hybrids was also significant in 2024 due to declining prices, taking on the demand that many expected for electric vehicles.

news.headline: Global inflatable dome market valued at USD 1.3 billion in 2023, projected to reach USD 2.4 billion by 2034 with 6.2% CAGR growth. Versatile structures used in events, exhibitions, sports. Major growth in Asia-Pacific due to urbanization and infrastructure development. Advanced materials stimulate demand for eco-friendly reusable solutions.
news.summary: The global inflatable dome market was valued at USD 1.3 billion in 2023 and is projected to grow at a CAGR of 6.2% from 2024 to 2034, reaching USD 2.4 billion by 2034. The market is driven by increasing demand for versatile and portable structures in events, exhibitions, and sports, as well as advancements in durable and lightweight materials. The domes are constructed using materials like PVC and inflated using air blowers for quick assembly and dismantling. North America and Europe currently dominate the market, but Asia-Pacific is expected to witness the fastest growth. The market caters to industries such as sports, exhibitions, planetariums, and disaster relief efforts. Key drivers include the need for cost-effective and flexible infrastructure, sustainable solutions, and popularity in emerging economies.

news.headline: DEFCON AI's ARTIV receives second "awardable" rating from OSD CDAO, enhancing its role in MS&A for defense and logistics.
news.summary: In McLean, Virginia, DEFCON AI, a company specializing in developing advanced modeling, simulation, and analysis tools for transportation, logistics, and military operations, revealed that its ARTIV™ has been approved by the Office of the Secretary of Defense (OSD) Chief Digital and Artificial Intelligence Office (CDAO) for the Open DAGIR platform. This recognition opens up opportunities for DEFCON AI to contribute to global information sharing.

Security 101 acquires Eos Business Surveillance Solutions to enhance capabilities, a major move in commercial security sector.
news.summary: In West Palm Beach, Florida, on December 12, 2024, Security 101, a leading provider of commercial security solutions across the nation and a part of Gemspring Capital's portfolio, revealed the acquisition of Eos Business Surveillance Solutions, LLC. news.summary: The recent launch of 741 in Boston follows Jaylen Brown's decision to reject over $50 million in shoe endorsement deals. NBA Finals MVP Jaylen Brown has introduced the athleisure division of his 741 brand, offering a distinctive luxury option.

news.summary: Book publisher DreaMaster Books has revealed that in the year 2025, author I. J. Weinstock will release the next installment of the divisive series SECRET SEX LIFE OF ANGELS. This eagerly anticipated addition is set to captivate fans of the series who have been eagerly awaiting its release. This collaboration was recently unveiled in San Mateo, California, and Tampa, Florida. The integration offers ClaimCenter Cloud users the opportunity to utilize AF’s services seamlessly.

The toolkit provides access to tools and infrastructure that aided Etiometry in obtaining nine FDA clearances. This release promises unmatched support for researchers in this field.

Accor announces new hotels, resorts, and experiences for 2025, setting the bar high for hospitality.
news.summary: Accor is leading the way in providing exceptional hospitality experiences in 2025, offering a range of new luxury hotels and resorts. From ultra-luxurious train journeys to serene seaside wellness retreats, Accor continues to innovate in the industry. With a focus on providing unparalleled experiences, Accor is set to redefine hospitality with its upcoming ventures. This includes a notable increase in high-end accommodations, with a total of 20 new hotels and resorts set to open globally next year. The company's dedication to offering unique and memorable stays is evident in its commitment to pushing boundaries and exceeding guest expectations in the coming year.

news.headline: Pickleball Kingdom expands to Columbus, OH with franchisee Steve Niehoff leading the development of premier indoor facilities.
news.summary: In Columbus, Ohio on December 12, 2024, Pickleball Kingdom, the leading indoor pickleball organization globally, revealed plans to establish a presence in the state by introducing top-tier indoor pickleball facilities to Columbus. Steve Niehoff, the franchisee, will spearhead this major initiative with the aim of catering to the growing demand for pickleball in the area.

news.headline: Businesses are increasingly experimenting with Gen AI tools, with 36% involved. Concerns about risks linger, as 58% call for improved data security policies.
news.summary: A recent survey found that 36% of business executives have started experimenting with Gen AI tools. Additionally, around one-third of respondents expressed significant concerns about the risks associated with Gen AI. The survey also revealed that 58% of participants believe their companies require enhanced data security measures and policies for the use of Gen AI. The survey was conducted in New York on December 12th.

news.headline: HashKey Chain launches $50M Atlas Grant Program to empower Web3 devs globally, drive innovation in OP Stack ecosystem.
news.summary: In Hong Kong on December 10, 2024, HashKey Chain revealed the launch of the Atlas Grant Program valued at $50 million. This program is designed to provide assistance to Web3 projects worldwide. Its primary objective is to spark creativity within the OP Stack ecosystem, expedite HashKey Chain's application layer expansion, and enhance on-chain development efforts.

news.headline: iTeos presents A2A-005 trial data at ESMO with 63.9% ORR and median PFS of 7.7 months for all patients. RP2D showed 73.3% ORR, 64.6% 6-month PFS. Inupadenant safety manageable. Deprioritized for other programs.
news.summary: Results from the Phase 2 A2A-005 trial showed that the combination of inupadenant with carboplatin/pemetrexed achieved an overall response rate (ORR) of 63.9% and a median progression-free survival (PFS) of 7.7 months for all participants. The recommended Phase 2 dose (RP2D) of inupadenant at 80mg in combination with carboplatin/pemetrexed resulted in a 73.3% ORR, with 64.6% of patients reaching a 6-month PFS milestone. The safety profile of the inupadenant + carboplatin/pemetrexed combination was reported as manageable and tolerable, with no observable dose-dependent toxicity. As a result of these findings, inupadenant has been deprioritized to allocate resources to other programs.

news.headline: Kidneyhood.org introduces study in new book on kidney diets, aiming to help manage kidney disease.
news.summary: A recently published book, The Evidence-Based Guide to Kidney and Renal Diets, is being lauded as a valuable resource for individuals managing kidney disease through diet. Released by Kidneyhood.org on December 12, 2024, the book introduces an innovative approach to navigating kidney disease with a focus on dietary practices. Featuring new findings, the book aims to assist individuals in making informed decisions regarding their diet to support renal health. This comprehensive guide presents evidence-based strategies and recommendations to enhance the management of kidney disease.

news.headline: LPL Financial adds Prestige Wealth Group advisors, managing $540M in assets, joining from Osaic.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, LPL Financial LLC (Nasdaq: LPLA) revealed that the advisors at Prestige Wealth Group (PWG), overseen by Rich Galgano, CFP®, and Matt Geraci, CFP®, have become part of LPL Financial's broker-dealer, RIA and custodial platforms. They bring with them a client base comprising around $540 million in assets under advisory, brokerage, and retirement plans* as they transition from Osaic to LPL.

Hacker crashes 69% of Dogecoin nodes, but DOGE price spikes 1.8%. Vulnerability exploited by Andreas Kohl from El Salvador. 647 nodes reduced to 315.
news.summary: A severe vulnerability in the Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) network has resulted in a significant disruption, causing 69% of its nodes to be inactive. Despite this, there was no notable impact on the price of Dogecoin. Andreas Kohl, co-founder of Sequentia, admitted to exploiting the flaw on Dec. 12 in El Salvador using a basic laptop. Prior to the incident, there were 647 active Dogecoin nodes, a number that dropped drastically to 315 post-exploit. Kohl disclosed that the exploit utilized a vulnerability identified by researcher Tobias Ruck, underscoring a critical weakness in the network's security.

news.headline: Trump-backed crypto venture links with controversial platform Tron, associated with terrorist groups. Raised $30M investment.
news.summary: A new cryptocurrency venture tied to U.S. President-elect Donald Trump has formed a partnership with a platform connected to questionable activities. World Liberty Financial Inc, a crypto project launched by Trump and billionaire Steve Witkoff, has joined forces with the Tron crypto platform as per Reuters. Tron has been linked to terrorist organizations, raising concerns among financial crime experts. Known for its efficiency compared to Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), Tron has reportedly facilitated crypto transactions involving said groups. Tron recently invested $30 million in World Liberty, with founder Justin Sun involved in the deal.

New Employee Portal for ABA practices streamlines management with centralized document storage; launched by Wilma™ in Diablo, CA.
news.summary: A recently updated portal offers secure and centralized document management, supporting ABA practices in maintaining compliance and efficiency. Introduced in Diablo, California on December 12, 2024, Wilma™, an AI-driven practice management system tailored for ABA therapy providers, aims to streamline operations. The portal enhances document security and organization, benefiting practices by ensuring regulatory adherence. This advancement in technology will help ABA practices in managing a large volume of documents accurately and securely.

Riot Hospitality Group to open Scottsdale's first fine dining supper club in 2025 at 7373 E Camelback Rd.
news.summary: A new culinary experience is set to make its mark in Scottsdale, Arizona as Riot Hospitality Group reveals plans to launch the city's premier fine dining supper club in early 2025. The Shiv Supper Club will be situated in Old Town at 7373 E Camelback Rd, offering a unique dining experience unlike any other in the area. This innovative venture will introduce Scottsdale to a bold new concept in dining, promising to elevate the local culinary scene. Stay tuned for more updates as the opening date approaches.

news.headline: New Kiddie Academy in Holly Springs focuses on early tech education in Raleigh, NC. Opened on Dec 12, 2024.
news.summary: Engineering professionals have applied their expertise to the newly opened franchise location of Kiddie Academy Educational Child Care in Holly Springs Towne Center, N.C. The Raleigh-area facility officially opened on December 12, 2024. This new location is part of the nationally acclaimed franchise, adding to their network of childcare centers.

news.headline: Producer inflation in U.S. rises more than expected to 3% in November, with PPI climbing 0.4% monthly. Economists forecasted 2.6%. Fed's interest rates under scrutiny.
news.summary: In November, U.S. producer prices saw a significant increase, surpassing expectations and fueling concerns about ongoing inflation trends. The producer price index surged by 3% year-over-year, the highest since February 2023, compared to the previous month's 2.6% and economist forecasts of 2.6%. This data, released on Thursday, coincided with an uptick in consumer price index inflation to 2.7% annually. On a monthly basis, the PPI rose by 0.4%, exceeding the previous month's 0.3% and the expected 0.2%. Excluding volatile items, the core PPI also rose by 3.4% annually, in line with the 3.4% reported in October. This data raises concerns about the broader economic outlook for inflation in the country.

news.headline: Sacks Parente Golf, Inc. priced an upsized $8.4 million public offering for golf products like putters and shafts.
news.summary: In Camarillo, CA, on Dec. 12, 2024, Sacks Parente Golf, Inc. (NASDAQ: SPGC) disclosed the pricing of a firm commitment underwritten public offering. The technology-driven golf company, known for its diverse range of golf merchandise such as putters, golf shafts, grips, and accessories, is set to generate around $8.4 million in gross proceeds from the offering. This total is stated before the subtraction of underwriting fees and additional estimated offering expenses that will be covered by the Company.

news.headline: Lumos Pharma acquired by Double Point Ventures for $38 million, $4.25 per share, includes contingent value right for future payments.
news.summary: Lumos Pharma, a biopharmaceutical company, and Double Point Ventures have completed a tender offer for Lumos Pharma’s shares at $4.25 per share in cash at closing, along with one contingent value right for each share. This deal represents an equity value of around $38 million, which is 7.6% higher than Lumos Pharma’s closing share price on Oct 22, 2024. The CVRs offer potential additional cash payments based on milestone events related to global net revenue of LUM-201 up to 2037. The agreement also covers future transactions and revenue agreements within 18 months of closing.

news.headline: EMA's CHMP adopts positive opinion for update to Ozempic® label, reflecting kidney disease risk reduction data. FLOW trial assessed risk reduction in CKD-related events for adults with type 2 diabetes, chronic kidney disease, including ≥50% decline in eGFR, onset of eGFR <15 ml/min/1.73 m2, initiation of kidney replacement therapy, kidney or cardiovascular death.
news.summary: Denmark's Bagsværd-based Novo Nordisk revealed today that the European Medicines Agency's Committee for Medicinal Products for Human Use (CHMP) has given a favorable opinion for updating the label of Ozempic® (a once-weekly subcutaneous semaglutide) to incorporate findings from the FLOW kidney outcomes trial. This trial evaluated the effectiveness of Ozempic® treatment in reducing the risk of chronic kidney disease-related issues in adults with type 2 diabetes and chronic kidney disease. The trial specifically focused on outcomes such as a persistent decline of at least 50% in estimated glomerular filtration rate (eGFR), the onset of a persistent eGFR below 15 ml/min/1.73 m2, the necessity for chronic kidney replacement therapy, kidney-related mortality, and cardiovascular-related mortality.

news.headline: Experts at Yerevan conference urge clear safeguards in Armenia's media self-regulation law for independence and transparency.
news.summary: During a conference held in Yerevan by The Armenia Project, experts emphasized the importance of independence and transparency. The event took place on December 12, 2024, and included prominent media personalities and democracy supporters. Discussions centered around the need for clarity and autonomy within Armenia's governance structures. Important issues regarding accountability and openness were addressed by panelists, with an emphasis on promoting democratic values.

news.headline: Charity Navigator unveils Beneficiary Voices Fund to support nonprofits valuing feedback from beneficiaries.
news.summary: A new fund has been established in New York on Dec. 12, 2024, by Charity Navigator, the largest nonprofit organization evaluator in the U.S. The Beneficiary Voices Fund invests in nonprofits that give importance to receiving feedback from the beneficiaries they serve. This fund features a carefully selected list of nonprofit organizations that prioritize beneficiary input.
